### People Helped

### Volunteers

### People Trained

[JOIN US](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/volunteer/)[DONATE](https://friendsofthedeaffoundation.org/donate/)

The challenges to changing the narratives surrounding Deaf people around the world, particularly in Africa, where public enlightenment is urgently needed for an inclusive society. FDF champions this course in Nigeria.

**_The handicap of deafness is not in the ear; it is in the mind. –_**[ ](https://www.brainyquote.com/authors/marlee-matlin-quotes)[Marlee Matlin](https://www.brainyquote.com/authors/marlee-matlin-quotes)

** _I actually think the deafness makes you see clearer. If you can’t hear, you somehow see._** – [David Hockney](https://www.brainyquote.com/authors/david-hockney-quotes)

As a friend of the Deaf, together we can promote the inclusion of persons with disabilities in our day-to-day activity as you journey with us.

## Have Questions? Get In Touch.

We are available and reachable always. Feel free to get in touch using any of the mediums below.  
You can chat with us directly on Whatsapp by clicking the WhatsApp icon at the bottom right of our website.

  * Info.friendsofthedeaf@gmail.com
  * +2348032223015
  * 34, Adamo-Agunfoye Road, Akanun, Ikorodu, Lagos
